source: CAOS LDA HSI master-plan builder catalog aligned to the current repository scripts
thin_slice_goal: Generate an explicit builder inventory that maps the current repo to the master-plan builder sequence
Write derived/manifests/index.json from curated artifacts rather than letting the web infer structure ad hoc
Treat the current derived tree as transitional until dedicated master-plan builders replace the older reset payload generators
analysis_uplift_priorities: Run all scientific builders only from .venv-pipeline with declared dependencies
Expand corpora toward relevance-first slices: high-variance, boundary-pure, boundary-mixed, HIDSAG region, and measurement-stratified documents
Promote build_lda_sweep from planned to verified thin slice under the hardened PTM stack
Add cross-engine topic-model comparison with sklearn, gensim, tomotopy, and BERTopic before widening the long-tail variant catalog
Treat statistical and external validation as required completion criteria, not as optional polish

builders.notes: Implemented as the first master-plan builder slice. Labeled raw scenes emit class-aware EDA summaries; unlabeled scenes currently emit global summaries plus per-band variance rows.

Initial builder slice implemented with patch_15 and slic_200. Local assignment arrays, local metadata, derived summaries, and preview images now exist, but the broader grouping catalog from the master plan is still pending.

Current repo computes compact PCA/NMF/LDA diagnostics but does not persist them under the master-plan representation contract. Under the hardened stack this builder should become the entry point for PCA/NMF/ICA plus CAE/VAE latent exports.

Initial builder slice implemented with uniform and quantile schemes, global and per_band domains, and Q={8,16}. It now publishes quantizer-level summaries and sensitivity metrics under data/derived/quantization/, but downstream LDA-linked quantization surfaces are still pending.

Initial builder slice implemented with magnitude-phrase__pixel, band-frequency__pixel, band-magnitude__pixel, and region-documents over patch_15 and slic_200. Local Parquet corpora plus document/vocabulary sidecars and derived recipe summaries now exist for uniform_per_band_Q16 and quantile_per_band_Q16, but pixel corpora are still capped by deterministic sampling and the next priority is to add relevance-first corpus families rather than only more volume.

Current local-core benchmarks include compact repeated LDA runs but not the explicit K-by-seed sweep artifacts required by the master plan. This is the next builder to verify under the hardened offline PTM stack.

Canonical phi/theta outputs and distance matrices are not yet written under the new contract. After build_lda_sweep is verified, this builder should prioritise sklearn, gensim, tomotopy, and BERTopic adapters before long-tail variants.
Current analysis payload offers compact PCA/KMeans diagnostics, not JS-MDS topic views.
Topic-to-label, topic-to-measurement, and top-document exports remain pending.
Current repo already computes compact reference-alignment summaries but not under the dedicated topic-to-library contract.
Agreement matrices are not yet exported as their own curated artifact family.
The repo already has compact supervised benchmark summaries, but not the full CI/test/effect-size contract.
Current spatial outputs are limited to compact preview overlays and baseline summaries.
Measured-target and library-alignment signals exist in compact form but not in the dedicated external-validation layout.
Current compact sample payloads are close in spirit but do not yet use the binary-plus-metadata browser contract.
Density heatmaps remain pending.
Narrative scoring is intentionally deferred until the supporting numeric surfaces exist.
Topic, document, and band cards are pending the topic-view and topic-to-data builders.
The six validation block definitions exist, but the dedicated builder that replaces nulls with curated metrics is still pending.
Initial master-plan scaffolding implemented in this repo state.
